message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The raw model trained successfully but fails both requirements: size is 690MB (>150MB) and local accuracy is 0.577 (<0.62). We need a better and smaller model. The most promising path is to improve preprocessing (lowercase + alphanumeric normalization) to reduce vocabulary, retrain with compact hyperparameters, quantize with retraining/cutoff, then evaluate. I will first remove the huge `.vec` file to free disk, rewrite preprocessing to create clean fastText data, train a compact model in the background with wordNgrams=2, dim=60, epochs=20, lr=0.7, minCount=3, bucket=100000, then poll for completion. After training, I will evaluate and quantize if needed.",
  "plan": "1. Delete `/app/work/model_raw.vec` and old model artifacts to free disk.
2. Rewrite `/app/prepare_fasttext_data.py` to lowercase text and replace non-alphanumeric characters with spaces, then regenerate `/app/work/train.txt` and `/app/work/test.txt`.
3. Train a compact fastText model in the background to avoid terminal hangs, logging to `/app/work/train_clean.log`.
4. Poll for up to 200 seconds in this batch to confirm training started and estimate ETA. If not done, subsequent batches will wait.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "rm -f /app/work/model_raw.vec /app/work/model_raw.bin /app/work/model_clean.bin /app/work/model_clean.vec /app/work/train_clean.log /app/work/train_clean.pid
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/prepare_fasttext_data.py <<'PY'
import pandas as pd, re, os

def normalize_text(x):
    if isinstance(x, list):
        x = ' '.join(str(s) for s in x)
    x = str(x).lower()
    x = x.replace('\r', ' ').replace('\n', ' ').replace('\t', ' ')
    x = re.sub(r'[^a-z0-9\s]', ' ', x)
    x = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', x).strip()
    return x

os.makedirs('/app/work', exist_ok=True)
for split, src, dst in [
    ('train', '/app/data/train-00000-of-00001.parquet', '/app/work/train.txt'),
    ('test', '/app/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet', '/app/work/test.txt'),
]:
    df = pd.read_parquet(src)
    with open(dst, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for label, text in zip(df['label'].astype(int).tolist(), df['text'].tolist()):
            f.write(f'__label__{label} {normalize_text(text)}\n')
    print(split, df.shape, '->', dst, os.path.getsize(dst))
PY
python3 /app/prepare_fasttext_data.py
",
      "duration": 45.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "nohup /opt/fastText/fasttext supervised -input /app/work/train.txt -output /app/work/model_clean -dim 60 -epoch 20 -lr 0.7 -wordNgrams 2 -bucket 100000 -minCount 3 -minn 0 -maxn 0 -loss softmax -thread $(nproc) > /app/work/train_clean.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /app/work/train_clean.pid
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "for i in $(seq 1 6); do
  pid=$(cat /app/work/train_clean.pid 2>/dev/null || true)
  if [ -n "$pid" ] && [ -d "/proc/$pid" ]; then status=running; else status=finished; fi
  size=$(stat -c %s /app/work/model_clean.bin 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  printf 'iter=%s status=%s bin_size=%s ' "$i" "$status" "$size"
  tail -1 /app/work/train_clean.log 2>/dev/null || true
  if [ "$status" = finished ] && [ "$size" -gt 0 ]; then echo training_done_break; break; fi
  sleep 30
done
",
      "duration": 200.0
    }
  ]
}
